badge_url.description: URL of a badge image displayed alongside the banner placeholder. When provided, the badge view becomes visible and loads the image from this URL.

is_shadow_enabled.description: Controls whether a shadow overlay is shown on the banner. When true, a shadow view is made visible and positioned over the banner. Defaults to false.

banner_placeholder.description: Text configuration for the banner placeholder, containing the display text and its color. Mapped to a TextConfig entity and rendered as a styled text view overlaying the banner area.

color.description: The color applied to the banner placeholder text. Resolved via CascadeColorPackage, which supports color paths or direct color values.

new_field.description: A field declared on TextConfigApiModel but not currently referenced or used anywhere in the codebase.

text.description: The text content displayed in the banner placeholder area. Rendered as a bold label using Typography.T11 in the UI.

id.description: Unique identifier for this banner placeholder component, used to match it within the list of generic screen components.
